title: The Glasshouse Summer
description: Newport, 1902. Theodore Brandt has spent his life in service at the great summer cottages of the very rich, and Eleanor Ashby-Vane has spent hers being displayed in them. They were not supposed to meet at all, let alone in the orchid house at two in the morning. A Gilded Age romance of two people on the wrong sides of a glass wall.

chapters.title: Two O'Clock in the Orchid House
